title: Ruparel College Merit List 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: Ruparel College Merit List 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: DG Ruparel College Merit List 2026 is out on 26 May 2026. Download the First Merit List PDF for FYBA, FYBCom, FYBSc, BSc IT & other UG courses. Check cut off, admission dates & direct download link at ruparel.edu.

content.text: Ruparel College Merit List 2026 (D. G. Ruparel College of Arts, Science and Commerce) has been officially released on 26 May 2026. Students can now download the First Merit List for FYBA, FYBCom, FYBSc, BSc IT, BSc CS and other undergraduate programs for the academic year 2026-27 from the official website ruparel.edu.

rows: D. G. Ruparel College of Arts, Science and Commerce (Autonomous)

sections.heading: Ruparel College Merit List 2026 Important Dates
How to Check Ruparel College Merit List 2026

items: Go to the Admission Notices 2026-27 section.
Click on the First Merit List link for your course.
Download the PDF and search your name using Ctrl + F.

sections.heading: Courses Offered & First Merit List 2026 (Direct Download Links)

rows: FYBA / FYBCom / FYBSc / BSc IT / BSc CS

seo_tags: Ruparel College FYBA FYBCom FYBSc Merit List.
